message:
fix(clippy): apply lint fixes across extensions, session, and interactive modules

Inline format argument in extensions.rs (write!("{byte:02x}") instead of
write!("{:02x}", byte)). Collapse nested if into single condition in
session_picker.rs (clippy::collapsible_if). Simplify unreachable else-after-
break blocks to direct returns in session_store_v2.rs (clippy::needless_else).
Make scroll_offset a const fn in interactive/state.rs
(clippy::missing_const_for_fn). Remove redundant .clone() calls on Copy/
last-use values in session_conformance.rs (clippy::redundant_clone).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
